title: AquaHouse AH-BUC Compatible for Rangemaster DxD Series Fridge 9016, Haier 0060218743 Water Filter
features: AquaHouse AH-BUC Water filter compatible with refrigerators made by Bosch, Rangemaster DXD, Haier, Neff, Siemens, Miele, Gaggenau, and Balay Ariston which are using one of the below filter models:

Compatible to replace fridge filter models: Rangemaster DXD, 90170, DXD910, Bosch Ultra Clarity, Haier 0060218743, RF-2800-13, RF-2800-15 0060820860, 10169, 101698B, 101699, 101699B, 644845, 499850, 643046 & more.

Premium compatible water filter, has been independently tested and certified by the Water Quality Association's Gold Seal program. Only products that pass rigorous testing and pass annual manufacturing facility audits are accepted onto the Gold Seal certification.

Filter meets NSF/ANSI 42 standard for material safety, structural integrity, and has been tested for chlorine reduction. Also meets NSF/ANSI 372 standard for lead free compliance. This gives the user confidence the filter is of high quality and safe for use with drinking water.
6 Month filter life. AquaHouse branded filter, Aquahouse is a registered trademark.
description: The AquaHouse AH-BUC is compatible with fridges made by Bosch, Rangemaster DXD, Haier, Neff, Siemens, Miele, Gaggenau, and Balay Ariston, and others if using one of the below filter references: Rangemaster DXD, 90170, DXD910, Bosch Ultra Clarity, Haier 0060218743, RF-2800-13, RF-2800-15 0060820860, 10169, 101698B, 101699, 101699B, 644845, 499850, 643046 & more. If your existing filter reference is not listed above but is similar in shape to the picture it will most likely to fit your fridge, but please check and compare the connection at the end of your filter to that product image. Please note this is a compatible spare part and the manufacturers' names and part numbers have been used for reference purposes only.
